summary: Re-tested backend lead APIs and full landing-page UX/integration on desktop and mobile. Brand red-white theme, PDF logo/images, floor gallery + tabbed plans, all CTA popup entry points, and form success submission are working.

issues: External "Made with Emergent" floating badge overlaps the bottom sticky CTA area and partially covers CTA text at bottom-right.

action_items: Handle/offset external floating badge overlap with mobile sticky CTA to keep CTA text fully visible.
Optional: add safe-area right padding or adaptive CTA width when third-party fixed badges are present.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and backend exposes lead CRUD with proper status handling.
All major interactive controls in App.js include data-testid, enabling stable regression automation coverage.
seed_data_creation: UI created QA test leads via popup submission; backend tests created temporary TEST_ leads with teardown cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Desktop + mobile CTA popup flows now pass (including desktop sticky CTA that previously failed in iteration_1). One remaining visual issue is external floating badge overlap on mobile sticky CTA.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open page on mobile (390x844) and observe bottom sticky CTA. Actual: third-party fixed "Made with Emergent" badge overlays CTA text area at bottom-right. Likely cause: external injected fixed element with high z-index not accounted for in CTA layout. Mitigation: add responsive spacing/position logic to sticky CTA to avoid overlap zones.
